hero.title: One-page
hero.subtitle: The essentials, done right. A fast, professional and responsive site
hero.br: to introduce yourself or launch an idea without breaking the bank.

priceRange.note: Fixed price depending on the level of complexity

items.text: no generic template — the site is built for you and your business
perfectly adapted to all screen sizes (mobile, tablet, desktop)
title tags, meta descriptions, clean HTML structure for Google
scroll-triggered appearances, hover effects on buttons
you receive all HTML/CSS/JS files — 100% yours

items.title: Brief & quote
items.desc: We chat by email or video call to understand your project, your business and your preferences. I send you a fixed quote within 24h.

items.title: Deposit & kickoff
items.desc: Once the quote is signed and the deposit received (50%), I start the design and development.

items.title: First delivery
items.desc: You receive the site on a preview link and can send me your feedback.

items.title: Revisions & sign-off
items.desc: I apply your feedback (2 rounds included). Once approved, you pay the balance and I hand over all the files.

tips.text: to get started I need your copy (or a draft), your logo (or a name idea), and a few examples of sites you like. The more precise your brief, the closer the result will be to your vision.

items.title: Do I keep ownership of the site?
items.desc: Yes, 100%. You receive all source files at final delivery. The site is entirely yours, with no strings attached.

items.title: What if I want to add a page later?
items.desc: Absolutely possible. Each additional page is charged from 150€ depending on complexity. You can also go with the multi-page website package from the start.

items.title: I don't have copy or a logo — is that a problem?
items.desc: Not at all, but it may extend the timeline. I can help you structure your copy. For the logo, I can create a simple typographic one for an extra 80€.

items.title: Can I edit the site myself after delivery?
items.desc: The site is built in plain HTML/CSS. Without technical knowledge it can be tricky. I recommend my maintenance package for updates (1h included per month).

hero.title: Multi-page
hero.subtitle: A complete, professional and custom site to present your business,
hero.br: build trust and turn visitors into clients.

priceRange.note: Fixed quote depending on number of pages and features

items.name: Home
items.desc: Introduction, hook and call to action

items.name: About
items.desc: Who you are, your background, your philosophy

items.name: Services
items.desc: Your offerings with pricing if desired

items.name: Portfolio
items.desc: Gallery of your work (optional)

items.name: Testimonials
items.desc: Reviews to build trust (optional)

items.name: Contact
items.desc: Form, Google Maps, contact details

items.text: consistent visual identity, colours and typography tailored to your business
clear, logical structure built for conversion
tags, semantic structure, loading speed, sitemap

items.title: Brief & quote
items.desc: We chat by email or video call to understand your project, your business and your preferences. I send you a fixed quote within 24h.

items.title: Deposit & kickoff
items.desc: Once the quote is signed and the deposit received (50%), I ask for your copy, photos and brand assets (logo, colours). Then I start designing.

items.title: Design & development
items.desc: I design and build the site, keeping you updated as needed.

items.title: Delivery & revisions
items.desc: You receive the site on a preview link. We go through up to 3 rounds of revisions to get it just right.

items.title: Sign-off & file handover
items.desc: Balance paid, source files handed over, quick walkthrough if needed. The site is yours.

items.title: What's the difference with the one-page site?
items.desc: The multi-page site includes several pages with navigation (Home, Services, About, Contact…). This allows better SEO, more content and a more complete presentation of your business.

items.title: Can I edit the content myself?
items.desc: The site is built in HTML/CSS or JavaScript with React. Text or image changes require some technical knowledge. That's why I offer maintenance packages with 30min to 1h30 of included edits per month.

items.title: What if I need more than 5 pages?
items.desc: Each additional page is charged from 150€. I can also provide a custom quote if your project is more ambitious.

items.title: Will the site rank well on Google?
items.desc: I optimise the technical SEO basics (structure, speed, tags). Full organic ranking takes time and also depends on your content. I recommend publishing quality content regularly.

hero.title: Hosting
hero.subtitle: Your site online, stable and looked after. Choose the plan that fits your needs

items.title: You keep ownership
items.desc: The domain and files are yours. If you cancel, you leave with everything — free migration assistance included.

items.title: One point of contact
items.desc: Display issue, email bug, slow site? Just write to me, I handle it. No hotline, no ticket system.

items.title: Professional email included
items.desc: contact@yourname.com looks far more professional than a @gmail.com. Included in all plans.

faq.title: I already have a domain name?
faq.desc: We can transfer it or point it to my server. Price adjusted accordingly.

faq.title: Can I cancel whenever I want?
faq.desc: Yes, no commitment. Just let me know 30 days in advance. I'll hand over all your files and assist with migration to another host if needed.

faq.title: So I keep ownership of my domain and site?
faq.desc: Absolutely. Your domain is registered in your name, and the site files are handed over at the initial delivery. The hosting plans are a service, not a dependency.

faq.title: Can I switch plans?
faq.desc: Yes, at any time. The change takes effect the following month.

faq.title: Is this service compatible with my site?
faq.desc: Yes for HTML/CSS/JavaScript sites. For other technologies, contact me to check.

faq.title: What happens if my site goes down at night?
faq.desc: A monitoring tool (UptimeRobot) notifies me as soon as the site is unreachable. I step in the next working morning. Outages are rare on professional hosting.

faq.title: Can I use my hour allowance all at once?
faq.desc: Yes, you can use it in one go or spread it across several small edits during the month. What matters is that the total stays under the included hours.

items.title: We fine-tune together
items.desc: A quick exchange to nail down the details

items.title: We kick off!
items.desc: 50% deposit and we're underway

items.title: Is the quote really free?
items.desc: Yes, no strings attached. I take the time to assess your project before proposing a fixed price.

items.title: I haven't figured everything out yet — is that a problem?
items.desc: Not at all. Just describe your idea, we'll refine it together during our exchange.

items.title: How long until I hear back?
items.desc: I commit to replying within 24 working hours, often much sooner.

items.title: Can I call you directly?
items.desc: I prefer an initial email contact to prepare the exchange, but a call can be arranged afterwards.
